steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 states Carter improved Wallace's light bulb design. Sentence 2 explains the precise method: placing cardboard around the carbon filament. The relationship is elaboration / specification — sentence 2 gives the specific detail of how the improvement was made.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the choices and eliminate
steps.content:
A. Soon, — signals a time sequence; sentence 2 is not a later event but an explanation of the same improvement. Eliminated.
B. Regardless, — signals concession (continuing despite an obstacle); no obstacle is mentioned. Eliminated.
C. However, — signals contrast; sentence 2 does not contradict sentence 1. Eliminated.
D. Specifically, — signals that a precise detail follows; correctly introduces the exact mechanism of Carter's improvement. Correct.

D is correct.
